role_boundary.P1: May be preregistered as the proposer after P1 setup artifacts pass; it is not its own verifier or promotion authority.
role_boundary.P2: May generate observable candidates. The evaluator must remain a separately implemented route and may not consume hidden reasoning or answer-key metadata.
role_boundary.P3: Not selected; P3 uses a disposable trainable state-complete workload rather than this frozen inference model.

cache_retention.rejected_weight_availability: rehydratable from exact public revisions; exact local snapshot manifests retained in initial_result_ref
cache_retention.xet_transfer_cache_disposition: redundant transfer chunks and staging removed after snapshot manifests were recorded

non_claims: Eligibility does not prove general model quality, safety, coding ability, reasoning quality, or transfer.
The selected model failed one of four development tasks.
The two rejected candidates and MPS abort remain part of the negative-knowledge record.
The selected runtime does not execute P1 or P2 and does not complete M2.
Model-role separation remains internal and is not external independence.
